rows.label: qev013203_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Yo, how's it going? Did you
find the Ensanguined Font?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013203_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Corondas that you are there now.

rows.label: qev013203_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Corondas if you are in the right location.

rows.label: qev013203_MSG0002
rows.name:
...I see, as expected. To think
you'd find it this fast.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013203_MSG0003
rows.name:
...No mistake. That's definitely
the Ensanguined Font.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013203_MSG0004
rows.name:
It's frustrating as the Captain
of Corondas's team, but it seems
this contest goes to...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013203_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Hold on, sorry. Looks like I'm getting
a call from that greenhorn right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013203_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Hey, what's wrong! Answer
me! What? What did you just
say? What happened out there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013203_MSG0008
rows.name: Hey! Tch... the signal cut out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013203_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Sorry, the situation
changed. It might be dangerous
for you to stay there too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013203_MSG0010
rows.name:
Head back to NLA immediately. Dammit!
What the hell is a black Doll![ST:wait ]
